channel.title: Posts on smraisul03@web
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on smraisul03@web

item.title: About Me
item.description: Return I am a current student at University of South Carolina Upstate, majoring in Computer Science with an expected graduation of 2025. Here are some of my most important infos: Resume Email LinkedIn

item.title: Projects
item.description: Return simpleCalculator Developed a calculator in Java that can do basic arithmetics calculation, number system conversions, and has additional capabilities. Also developed a text editor within the calculator that has the capability to edit, delete, save, and change text to their liking through various fonts and colors. simpleClock Developed a clock in Java that can tell the 24 hours time, along with real time date of current standing. simplePainter Developed a paint program in Python that can allow user to paint, save, quit, and draw, with a variety of options to their liking through various colors.
